GR1 USA - Cordura

Regular price $335.00
Regular price $395.00 Sale price $335.00
Back Panel: 1000D
Size: 21L
Color: Black
  • In stock
  • Inventory on the way

FROM BAGHDAD TO NYC

GR1 was built to thrive in Baghdad and NYC and has been tested and proven by Green Berets to meet the life or death standards of quality, toughness, and performance. It has proven itself the world over and earned its “Greatest Of All Time” status the hard way: one deployment, one event, one trip, one mile at a time. 1,000 Events/year, 175,000+ participants, and 200+ Special Forces Cadre later, the GORUCK Challenge is the most significant quality control program of its kind. No other bag is consistently put through more abuse, and GR1 thrives.

The GR1 is built with a minimalist approach in mind and includes only the necessary features of an everyday carry rucksack: a bombproof laptop compartment, opens flat for easy packing, and built with Special Forces grade materials.

Proven to Special Forces standards, GR1 is synonymous with the best of American Manufacturing. Each GR1 is built to last and comes with our Scars Lifetime Guarantee.

Features
  • Quick access zipper pocket under the top handle.
  • 3 styles of back panel: 1000D Cordura is our original GR1 fabric. 210D is smoother and we use this on the Rucker. 500D on MultiCam Arid (which only comes in 500D) - it splits the difference.
  • Opens Flat making it easier to pack and organize
  • Extra Padded Shoulder straps and top handle to carry heavier loads more comfortably
  • YKK zippers with silent, glove friendly zipper pulls constructed from parachute 550 cord
  • Waterproof YKK AquaGuard quick access pocket and laptop compartment zippers (not on 21L + 26L Black + Gold, 21L + 26L Navy + Gold).
  • Bombproof Laptop Compartment next to your back is extra reinforced and has a false bottom so that when you set your ruck down, your laptop won't even notice
  • A removable, hard plastic frame sheet stabilizes the laptop compartment and allows you to carry more weight comfortably.
  • Multiple Pockets: 3 internal pockets: 1 large elastic pocket, 1 large mesh zippered pocket, and 1 small go-to pocket, plus the QAP and external slant pocket.
  • MOLLE Attachments: 3 rows of external and internal MOLLE webbing let you customize GR1 how you want.
  • Rainproof: Our rucks are highly water resistant aka rainproof
  • Perfect Travel Size: TSA Compliant and fits under the seat in front of you
  • Scars Lifetime Guarantee: The best guarantee on the market
  • Overbuilt in the USA
Specs + Materials

21L Dimensions: 11.5"W x 18"H x 5.5"D
21L Weight: 2.8 LBS
26L Dimensions: 12"W x 20"H x 6.75"D
26L Weight: 3.1 LBS
210D Back Panel Primary Material: 1000D Cordura w/ 210D Back Panel and Shoulder Straps
1000D Back Panel Primary Material: 1000D Cordura w/ 1000D Back Panel and Shoulder Straps
500D Back Panel Primary Material: 500D Cordura w/ 500D Back Panel and Shoulder Straps
Laptop Protection (21L): Fits most 15" laptops
Laptop Protection (26L): Fits most 16" laptops
External Slant Pocket: 21L: 11"W x 10"H / 26L: 11.5"W x 12.5"H
Internal Elastic Pocket: 21L: 11"W x 10"H / 26L: 11.5"W x 11"H
Internal Mesh Pocket: 21L: 11"W x 10"H / 26L: 11.5"W x 12.5"H
Internal Cordura Pocket: 21L: 11"W x 6"H / 26L: 11.5"W x 6"H

Shipping + Returns

Free Shipping for GORUCK Tribe members
All GORUCK Tribe members qualify for FREE No-Rush Shipping to any USA (lower 48) address. No promo code needed. Does not apply to international orders.

Easy + Free Returns
Don't like it? Send back any full-priced item within 30 days of delivery with free return shipping in the USA. Does not apply to closeout items on sale or charity donation products.

Scars Lifetime Guarantee

You Break It, We Fix It.
All GORUCK built gear and apparel comes with our Scars Lifetime Guarantee.

1% for Those Who Serve

We Give Back for Every Sale
As an American business with Special Forces roots, we at GORUCK are proud to donate 1% of our annual top line revenue to various non-profit partners who support those who serve — this means military, Veterans, First Responders (LEO, Fire), teachers, social workers, and communities such as military spouses.

GR1 USA - Cordura

Regular price $335.00
Regular price $395.00 Sale price $335.00

Special Forces grade materials

1000 Denier Cordura is the preferred material for all Special Forces Rucks because it is resistant to the rigors of everything, including war. It's tried and tested.

Zero Abrasion

210D HT (High Tenacity) CORDURA® on the back panel and underside of the shoulder straps won't irritate your skin or chew up apparel.

Frame Sheet for added stability

A removable, hard plastic frame sheet stabilizes the laptop compartment and allows you to carry more weight comfortably.

MOLLE Attachments

3 rows of external and internal MOLLE webbing let you customize GR1 how you want.

Padded straps & Handle

Shoulder straps and top handle are extra padded to carry heavier loads more comfortably.

Rainproof

1000D Cordura is highly water resistant aka rainproof.

Silent Zipper Pulls

YKK zippers with silent, glove friendly zipper pulls constructed from parachute 550 cord.

Organized and Accessible

GR1 opens flat to make it easier to pack, organize, and find something when on the go. Special Forces medical rucks share a similar design. Inside you'll find 3 interior pockets: 1 large elastic pocket, 1 large mesh zippered pocket, and 1 small go-to pocket.

Bombproof Laptop Compartment

The separate compartment next to your back is extra reinforced to securely take a laptop into combat. The frame sheet adds structure and stability so it's not you computer that's keeping the GR1 in its shape. Keep your most important item of gear safe wherever you go.

Built in the USA

The GR1 backpack is proudly American-made, built right here at home using GORUCK construction techniques proven by Special Forces soldiers in the harshest environments on planet earth. Then we spent years honing it into the American icon it is today.

Scars Lifetime Guarantee

All GORUCK built gear and apparel comes with our Scars Lifetime Guarantee.

1% for Those Who Serve

As an American business with Special Forces roots, we are proud to donate 1% of our annual top line revenue to non-profit partners who support those who serve.

GORUCK Tribe

Join GORUCK Tribe to earn a Monthly Patch and get Free No-Rush Shipping on all GORUCK orders to any USA (lower 48) address.
